widgets_values:
3 young lady walking in a shopping mall. (image 1) lady with a baseball jacket and dark hair, she is stand on the left side , and she is carrying a shoulding sling bag on the left shoulder, smile looking at (image 2) lady.
(image 2) lady with blue jacket, blonde hair, she is talking and smile with other 2 ladies, she stand on the middle holding other 2 ladies arms walking.
(image 3) lady with silm fit purple sweater and dark hair, she is stand on the right side looking at (image 2) lady , smile, then she rise up her hand , happy.
Overall, a ladies talk and shopping scenes.
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走，倒着跑
